name: Star Equity Holdings, Inc.
business: Star Equity Holdings, Inc. is a diversified multi-industry holding company operating through four reportable segments: Building Solutions, Business Services, Energy Services, and Investments. The Building Solutions segment manufactures modular buildings, structural wall panels, engineered wood products, and glue-laminated timber for residential, commercial, and industrial markets. The Business Services segment delivers customized recruitment and contracting solutions to mid-to-large multinational companies, including Recruitment Process Outsourcing, contingent workforce solutions, and managed service provider services. The Energy Services segment manufactures and supplies specialized drilling tools and downhole equipment used in directional drilling for oil and gas well construction as well as other applications, including mining, geothermal, and water wells.

exposures.sentence: The Building Solutions segment operates in the construction industry.

Building Solutions includes KBS Builders, Inc. (KBS), EdgeBuilder, Inc. (EdgeBuilder), Glenbrook Building Supply, Inc. (Glenbrook) (together, EBGL), and Timber Technologies Solutions, Inc. (TT), which manufacture modular buildings, structural wall panels, engineered wood products, and glue-laminated timber for residential, commercial, and industrial markets.

The Energy Services segment consists of ADT, which manufactures and supplies specialized drilling tools and downhole equipment used in directional drilling for oil and gas well construction as well as other applications, including mining, geothermal, and water wells.

The Energy Services segment consists of ADT, which manufactures and supplies specialized drilling tools and downhole equipment used in directional drilling for oil and gas well construction as well as other applications, including mining, geothermal, and water wells.

The Business Services segment, which consists of Hudson Talent Solutions, LLC (HTS), delivers customized recruitment and contracting solutions to mid-to-large multinational companies, including Recruitment Process Outsourcing (RPO), project-based RPO, contingent workforce solutions, recruitment consulting, outsourced professional contract staffing, and managed service provider (MSP) services.
